entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the concepts, principles and processes of Biology
entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Describe the physiological, anatomical and ecological processes of living organisms
entries.learning_activity: (a) Describe nutrition in human and ruminants (nutrients, digestive system and processes)
teaching_learning_activities: Brainstorming: Guide students to brainstorm on the concept of nutrition in human and ruminants
Jigsaw: Guide students to explore nutrients, nutritional deficiency and disorders through jigsaw
ICT-Based learning: Guide student to explain the digestive system, digestion processes in human and ruminants through simulation
Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to discuss diseases and disorders of human digestive system and diseases of human digestive system
entries.assessment: Nutrition in human and ruminants is described clearly
resources: charts/ pictures displaying variety of food nutrients
models/charts of human and ruminant digestive system
dissected mammal specimen displaying digestive system
entries.references: Biology Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the concepts, principles and processes of Biology
entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Describe the physiological, anatomical and ecological processes of living organisms
entries.learning_activity: (b) Describe the mechanism of transportation of materials in flowering plants (vascular system, absorption and movement of water and mineral salts and transpiration)
teaching_learning_activities: Brainstorming: Guide students to brainstorm on the concept of transportation of materials in flowering plants
Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to discuss vascular system
ICT based learning: Guide students to explain absorption and movement of water and mineral salts in plants and transpiration process through simulation
Question and answers: Guide students to explain factors affecting rate of transpiration through questions and answers
entries.assessment: Mechanism of transportation of materials in flowering plants is described clearly
resources: Charts/model/ photographs showing transportation of materials in plants
transportation of materials in plants online resources
entries.references: Biology Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the concepts, principles and processes of Biology
entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Describe the physiological, anatomical and ecological processes of living organisms
entries.learning_activity: (c) Describe the mechanism of transportation of materials in the human body (the mammalian heart, blood vessels, blood, blood circulation)
teaching_learning_activities: Brainstorming: Guide students to brainstorm on the concept of transportation of materials in human body
Field trip: Guide students to visit nearby health facility to learn about blood cells, blood groups, blood pressure and blood transfusion
ICT-Based learning: Guide students to explain the structure of the heart and blood circulation in human through simulation
Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to discuss the importance of blood circulation, diseases and disorders of the human circulatory system
entries.assessment: The mechanism of transportation of materials in the human body are described clearly
resources: dissected mammal displaying the heart and major blood vessels
charts showing diseases and disorders of human circulatory system
entries.references: Biology Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the concepts, principles and processes of Biology
entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Describe the physiological, anatomical and ecological processes of living organisms
entries.learning_activity: (d) Describe the mechanisms of gaseous exchange and respiration in mammals (gaseous exchange in mammals, aerobic and anaerobic respiration)
teaching_learning_activities: Brainstorm: Guide students to brainstorm the concept of gaseous exchange and respiration in mammals
ICT-based learning: Guide students to explain the mechanism of gaseous exchange and respiration in mammals through simulation/ animation/ video
Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to discuss on factors affecting the rate of gaseous exchange and respiration in mammals
Guest speaker: Invite guest speaker to share with students on various infections and diseases of respiratory system
Exploration: Guide students to explore how aerobic and anaerobic respiration are applied in their real life
entries.assessment: The mechanisms of gaseous exchange and respiration in mammals are described clearly
resources: Models/ photographs/ charts showing structure of the lungs and alveolus in human
online resources on gaseous exchange and respiration in mammals
entries.references: Biology Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Conduct biological investigations
entries.specific_competence: 2.1 Demonstrate mastery of basic skills for conducting biological investigations
entries.learning_activity: (a) Investigate food nutrients in various food samples
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Guide students in manageable groups to explore the scientific procedures required to conduct food test
Laboratory practical: Guide students to investigate food nutrients in various food samples
entries.assessment: Food nutrients in various food samples are investigated correctly using the scientific procedures
entries.references: Biology Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Conduct biological investigations
entries.specific_competence: 2.2 Prepare and present results of biological investigations
entries.learning_activity: (a) Prepare and present a report of a biological investigation on ( food nutrients in various food samples, transportation of materials in flowering plants, pulse rate in human, aerobic and anaerobic respiration )

Presentation: Guide students to present a biological investigation report
entries.assessment: A biological investigation report is prepared and presented correctly using scientific procedures
